sourcesContent:
// Design system colors - exact match to web app CSS variables
// Converted from HSL to hex for React Native

const Colors = {
  // Backgrounds
  background: '#080e1d',       // hsl(222.2, 84%, 4.9%)
  card: '#0f1929',             // hsl(222.2, 47.4%, 11.2%)
  cardHover: '#142038',

  // Text
  foreground: '#f1f5f9',       // hsl(210, 40%, 98%)
  mutedForeground: '#8fa3b8',  // hsl(215, 20.2%, 65.1%)

  // Brand
  primary: '#0fb872',          // hsl(160, 84%, 39.4%) - green
  primaryForeground: '#080e1d',
  primaryLight: 'rgba(15, 184, 114, 0.12)',

  accent: '#7c52e8',           // hsl(263, 70%, 58%) - purple
  accentLight: 'rgba(124, 82, 232, 0.12)',

  // States
  secondary: '#1a2c42',        // hsl(217.2, 32.6%, 17.5%)
  muted: '#1a2c42',
  border: '#1e3047',
  input: '#1e3047',

  // Status colors
  destructive: '#f04444',
  destructiveLight: 'rgba(240, 68, 68, 0.12)',
  amber: '#f59e0b',
  amberLight: 'rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12)',
  sky: '#38bdf8',
  skyLight: 'rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.12)',
  violet: '#8b5cf6',
  violetLight: 'rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.12)',
  cyan: '#22d3ee',
  cyanLight: 'rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.12)',
  orange: '#fb923c',
  orangeLight: 'rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.12)',
  slate: '#94a3b8',
  slateLight: 'rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.12)',

  // Tier colors
  tierDiamond: '#22d3ee',
  tierGold: '#f59e0b',
  tierSilver: '#94a3b8',
  tierBronze: '#fb923c',

  // Common
  white: '#ffffff',
  black: '#000000',
  transparent: 'transparent',
};

export default Colors;
